summary: Rare back‑to‑back Cold Rain and Snow / C.C. Rider pairing praised, but recording details are unknown
review: The reviewer highlights the unusual consecutive performance of "Cold Rain and Snow" followed by "C.C. Rider," noting it happened only 19 times in Dead history and 14 times in the same set. No comments are provided about the audio source or sound quality, so the technical aspect remains unclear.

ai_rating.rationale: Only a single enthusiastic comment about song selection; no information on performance nuance or recording fidelity, leading to an average rating with low confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No specific comments regarding sound clarity, mix, or source type were made by the reviewer.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The two songs appear back‑to‑back, a rare pairing that the reviewer finds musically significant.
